sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56351" key="kegxri/nhs2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεγχρ-ίνης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n56351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κεγχρίας</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n56351.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> a bird, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
